questions.q: According to its cinematic trailer released on April 30, 2026, when will 'Subnautica 2' officially enter Early Access?
questions.correctText: Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on PC and Xbox Series X/S on May 14, 2026.

questions.q: Which upcoming sci-fi action-adventure RPG released a 'Conversation Choices First Look' trailer in late April 2026 featuring the companion Phaedra?
questions.correctText: EXODUS released new gameplay footage showing a conversation with the Celestial virus-infected companion Phaedra.

questions.q: Developed by Unfrozen, which turn-based strategy prequel launched into Early Access on April 30, 2026?
options: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
questions.correctText: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era was released into Early Access, bringing back the classic strategy gameplay.

questions.q: What is the name of the new vehicular action game from Strange Scaffold where you play as the vehicle that famously sends people to a fantasy world?
options: Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?!
questions.correctText: Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?! is a chaotic driving game built around the classic isekai anime trope.

questions.q: Developed by former Burnout creators at Fuse Games, what is the official release date for the arcade racing game 'Star Wars: Galactic Racer'?
questions.correctText: Star Wars: Galactic Racer will officially be released on October 6, 2026 for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X/S.
